text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew. Okay, time for a five-minute break.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me! You're Narita Taishin, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... What's it to you? ...Who even are you?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: I'm... I'm a huge fan of yours!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You are?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I mean—yeah? Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry for just walking up to you like this, but I
wanted to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What for?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
Well... I get teased a lot because of my large
glasses.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
But watching you motivated me to do better for
myself, and I gained the confidence to stand up
to bullies!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I managed to tell them to knock it
off for the first time in my life, so I wanted to
thank you for—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, that had nothing to do with me.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, um... Sorry, I didn't mean to...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who found the courage to face
your bullies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You should keep it up and continue making
yourself proud.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Your self-worth has nothing to do with anyone
else. Not even me.
That day, Narita Taishin receives a fan letter.

But its contents are slightly different from what
she usually gets.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be cheering you on whether you like it or not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh. That's the spirit.
